0.title: Packages
0.content: effect-libs 0.1.0 . effect-libs is a set of open-source libraries to be used in complement to the effect library. Extends some Effect modules (Array, Chunk, Option, Either, String, …). Adds extra-functionalities such as date and number parsing/formatting, sscanf/sprintf templating, number rounding, object pretty-printing, colored terminal printing, a simple yet very efficient matcher and a tree with cycle detection .
